items.title: USA Would Love A Pre-World Cup Win. But Do They Actually Need One?
items.summary: The USA's World Cup squad could use some momentum. Beating either Senegal or Germany beforehand would help.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Gill: Physically RCB might have advantage, but finals are all about mental strength
items.summary: GT face the unenviable task of playing a third game, at a third venue, in six days when they take on RCB in the IPL 2026 final on Sunday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: USA World Cup 2026 team guide
items.summary: Optimism is not high for Mauricio Pochettino’s co-hosts, who are under pressure to justify fans’ considerable outlay on tickets This article is part of the Guardian’s 2026 World...
